decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to use a combination of counterspells, bounce spells, and removal to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By efficiently managing resources and utilizing powerful control pieces like Gran-Gran and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to outvalue opponents and maintain a strong grip on the game. Additionally, the inclusion of powerful finishers like Ral, Crackling Wit and The Legend of Kuruk allows the deck to close out games once it has established control.

The Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, then overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. Earthbender Ascension and Meltstrider's Resolve provide extra protection and evasion for your creatures, while cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Esper Origins help pump up your board and deal extra damage. The deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and quickly finish the game before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by bouncing opponent's permanents back to their hand, while utilizing burn spells to deal direct damage and control the board. It also includes card draw and selection to maintain card advantage and find key pieces. The creatures in the deck provide additional removal options and threats, while the land base ensures consistent mana production. The key strategy is to disrupt the opponent's game plan and slowly chip away at their life total until achieving victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards to quickly return powerful creatures from the graveyard to the battlefield, creating a powerful and unstoppable force. By controlling the opponent's hand with Duress and setting up the graveyard with Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with creatures like Doomsday Excruciator and Superior Spider-Man. The inclusion of cards like Stock Up and Deadly Cover-Up allows for card advantage and protection, while utilizing cards like Quantum Riddler and Multiversal Passage to outmaneuver the opponent.

The deck focuses on using spells to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It includes cards that bounce or delay opponent's threats, as well as burn spells to deal damage. The deck also features card draw and selection to ensure consistency in drawing key pieces. The mana base is designed to support the control elements of the deck, with a mix of Islands and dual lands to help cast spells of both blue and red colors. Overall, the deck aims to maintain control of the game and outvalue the opponent through efficient spell usage.

This deck focuses on using a combination of powerful spells and abilities to control the flow of the game. By using cards like Abandon Attachments, Artist's Talent, and Combustion Technique, the player can manipulate the board and keep their opponent on the defensive. With support from cards like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration, the player can also maintain their own resources and advantage. By carefully managing their spells and utilizing cards like It'll Quench Ya! and Accumulate Wisdom, the player can outmaneuver their opponent and come out on top.

This deck focuses on utilizing cheap spells and creatures to apply constant pressure on the opponent, aiming to quickly deplete their life total. By efficiently utilizing card draw and bounces, the deck can maintain a fast pace and keep the opponent on the back foot. With a mix of burn spells and evasive creatures, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victories through aggressive strategies. The inclusion of versatile cards allows for adaptability in different matchups and ensures that the deck can maintain its tempo throughout the game.

The main concept of this Temur Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on playing efficient creatures like Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider, while also using burn spells like Burst Lightning and Ill-Timed Explosion to clear the opponent's threats. Wistfulness and Vibrance provide card draw and card advantage, while cards like Roaming Throne and Secluded Courtyard help to ramp up mana quickly. The deck aims to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent before they can stabilize or set up their own game plan.

The deck focuses on using a combination of spells and creatures to control the board and outvalue the opponent. By casting spells like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom, you can draw cards and generate card advantage. Cards like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique help to control the board and remove threats. Monument to Endurance and Riverpyre Verge provide resources and additional ways to generate value. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent by controlling the game and utilizing its resources efficiently.

The deck focuses on using cards like Omniscience and Thundertrap Trainer to assemble powerful combos that allow you to cast spells for free and take advantage of various synergies. Utilizing cards like Lost in the Maze and Bounce Off for control, as well as Formidable Speaker and Uthros, Titanic Godcore for additional support and pressure. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with powerful creatures and spells while maintaining control of the board and ultimately achieving victory through a well-executed combination of cards.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board of aggressive creatures in order to overwhelm the opponent with damage. It utilizes low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo to establish board presence early on. The inclusion of cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension allows for these creatures to grow stronger as the game progresses. The deck also incorporates cards like Royal Treatment and Escape Tunnel to protect and support its creatures, ensuring that they can continue to push for damage and secure victory.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy through countering their spells, bouncing their permanents, and removing their threats. It utilizes cheap and efficient spells to control the board while generating card advantage through card draw effects. The deck also includes creatures with abilities that can slow down the opponent's game plan. By maintaining control of the board and continuously disrupting the opponent's plays, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure a victory through attrition.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game by countering opponents' spells, bouncing their threats back to hand, and pinging them with direct damage. The deck includes efficient draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to help find key pieces. Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab provide additional control elements, while Stormchaser's Talent and Burst Lightning offer damage potential. The inclusion of Roaring Furnace/Steaming Sauna and Stock Up provide additional removal and value. Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage help fix mana, while Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off offer versatile removal options.

This deck focuses on using a combination of card draw, counterspells, and removal to control the game until it can dominate with powerful creatures like Glacial Dragonhunt and Hearth Elemental. It relies on efficiently cycling through the deck with Sleight of Hand and Opt while using spells like Abandon Attachments and Burst Lightning to keep the opponent's threats at bay. The goal is to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent while setting up a winning board state with a mix of creatures and spells.

The focus of this Izzet Control deck is on controlling the battlefield and hand advantage through a combination of card draw, bounce spells, and removal. By utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics, Burst Lightning, and Eddymurk Crab, the deck aims to disrupt opponents' strategies while efficiently drawing through the deck with spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent to secure victory once the opponent's resources have been depleted. With a mix of control and burn spells, this deck seeks to outlast opponents and secure victory through card advantage and strategic plays.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while using Earthbender Ascension to buff creatures and push for early damage. Royal Treatment and Escape Tunnel provide protection and evasion for key creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Sazh's Chocobo. Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer add additional power to the board, while Promising Vein and Meltstrider's Resolve provide ways to maintain pressure on the opponent. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy.
